newsletter.title: One email a month.
newsletter.body: Field notes from inside the work — what's actually moving funding decisions, where AI is quietly rewriting jobs, and the unglamorous mechanics of building teams that ship. Written by humans who'd rather under-send than waste your inbox.

footer.address: 1, Aleea Pasărea în Văzduh, Bucharest, RO
footer.tagline: What is learned can be unlearned.
footer.description: The Unlearning School builds programs, systems and useful ways of working for teams dealing with projects funding pressure, AI adoption, digital change and the future of work.

inline.title: Prefer a 2-minute self-test?
inline.body: 10 questions across strategy, tools, adoption and impact. Instant maturity score, gap analysis, and the next move that matters.

band.title: 2 minutes. 10 questions.
band.body: A weighted maturity model. Instant score, gap analysis across four dimensions, and a ranked next-step roadmap.
